user.title: KNX Programming Mode Watcher
user.description: Reuses Home Assistant's KNX integration to detect devices in programming mode. Scanning is off by default — turn on the 'KNX Programming Mode Scanning' switch when you want to scan.

abort.already_configured: KNX Programming Mode Watcher is already configured.

data.identify: Read mask / vendor / order / serial when a device enters programming mode
